name: theme-handler
description: Manage and update application themes using shadcn and tweakcn.
capabilities: Lists 40+ curated themes from tweakcn library
Generates installation commands for shadcn CLI
Provides theme names and corresponding URLs
Supports modern design themes like Minimal, Cyberpunk, Neo Brutalism
author: AayushBaniya2006
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill containing only instructions and theme references. No code execution, no network calls, no filesystem access. Static findings are false positives: scanner misidentified URL paths as backtick execution, common words as C2 indicators, and JSON structure as cryptographic patterns. All 102 detected issues are dismissed as harmless documentation content.
valueStatement: Managing application themes manually requires finding theme URLs and running CLI commands. This skill provides a curated list of pre-configured themes and installation commands, making theme installation fast and error-free.
userTitle: Install UI themes with shadcn and tweakcn
limitations: Only supports themes from the tweakcn library
Requires pnpm and shadcn CLI to be installed
Does not apply themes automatically; user must run commands

useCases.title: Apply pre-built themes
useCases.description: Quickly browse and install curated themes for React applications using shadcn UI components.

useCases.title: Consistent styling
useCases.description: Standardize application appearance by selecting from vetted theme collections.

useCases.title: Rapid prototyping
useCases.description: Apply professional themes instantly during prototyping without manual configuration.

promptTemplates.title: Install a theme
promptTemplates.prompt: Install the Modern Minimal theme using the theme-handler skill.

promptTemplates.prompt: Update my application theme to Cyberpunk using theme-handler.

promptTemplates.title: Filter by category
promptTemplates.prompt: Find and install a retro-style theme using theme-handler.

bestPractices: Preview themes at tweakcn.com before installing to ensure they match your design vision.
Test themes in a development environment before applying them to production.
Back up existing theme configuration files before making changes.
antiPatterns: Installing themes without previewing them first may result in mismatched design aesthetics.
Applying multiple themes simultaneously can cause conflicts and unexpected styling.
Skipping dependency installation (pnpm, shadcn CLI) will prevent theme commands from working.

faq.question: Which AI tools support this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code through their skill invocation system.

faq.question: How many themes are available?
faq.answer: The skill includes 40+ themes including Modern Minimal, Cyberpunk, Claude, Vercel, and many more.

faq.question: Does this work with other package managers?
faq.answer: The skill uses pnpm commands. You may adapt the commands for npm or yarn if shadcn supports them.

faq.question: Is my data safe when installing themes?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only provides instructions. The shadcn CLI fetches themes from tweakcn.com, a trusted source.

faq.question: Themes are not applying correctly. What should I do?
faq.answer: Verify pnpm and shadcn CLI are installed. Check your theme configuration files for conflicts. Restart your dev server.

faq.question: How is this different from manual theme installation?
faq.answer: This skill provides curated, tested theme URLs and ready-to-run commands, eliminating guesswork and configuration errors.
